name: noni
description: US5 — allow_user_input: true, but WHEEL_NONINTERACTIVE=1 must still block

steps.instruction: Run `wheel flag-needs-input "try to pause"` — with WHEEL_NONINTERACTIVE=1 it MUST exit 1 with a 'non-interactive' message. Capture the exit code, then write {"noninteractive_denied": true} to .wheel/outputs/headless.json.
